{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ragnarus mask
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Ragnarus mask]] allows the wearer to pull power from [[Naraka]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20">''House of Blades'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Ragnarus mask]] ages the wearer to death within a few hours.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
